title: Cymatic Planner PASS: BFS plan compiles into verified control cert (replay consistent)
_fixture_purpose: Demonstrates the full search→plan→execution→witness chain: the planner finds flat→stripes→hexagons in k=2, then proves its plan compiles into the independently-certified control cert (control_cert_pass_hexagon.json). The validator confirms: (1) plan is BFS-shortest, (2) compiled_control_witness_hash matches the control cert on disk, (3) target/initial/final/move-sequence are semantically consistent. This closes the compilation loop: QA plans are not just found but proven to compile into executable certified controllers.

qa_mapping.planning_qa_analogue: Full QA compiler chain: (1) BFS over orbit graph finds shortest singularity→cosmos path in k=2 steps passing through satellite; (2) plan compiles into a certified controller whose hash is pinned; (3) controller replay witness is independently verified. The hash pin makes the compilation claim unforgeable: any change to the control cert breaks the planner cert's integrity check.

validation_checks.details: bfs in {bfs, dfs, astar, dijkstra, iddfs}

validation_checks.description: every plan step is a legal edge in control_graph
observed final pattern class matches target pattern class
no disordered/out_of_orbit state visited in plan
validation_checks.details: plan visits only flat, stripes, hexagons

validation_checks.description: compiled control cert hash matches and semantic fields consistent
validation_checks.details: cert qa.cert.cymatics.control.hexagon_reachable.v1 found; hash ef54d9c3... matches; target=hexagons, initial=flat, final=hexagons, moves=[increase_amplitude,set_frequency] all consistent
